description_long: This is a rectangular, two-story school building with a prominent central entrance and a small cupola on the roof. The facade features a colorful mural with abstract patterns and a sun motif, suggesting a welcoming and creative environment. The building has a symmetrical design, with a main entrance protruding from the center and flanked by two wings. Windows are arranged in a regular grid along the visible sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The roof is pitched, and the cupola adds a traditional architectural touch. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with painted exterior surfaces.
description: A rectangular, two-story school building with a central entrance, cupola, and colorful mural facade.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pitched roof and cupola, with minimal visible detail on the facade.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, cupola, and a vibrant mural covering the facade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the cupola and entrance visible, but no mural details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain back of the building with no mural or entrance features.
